positive: A stylized, central illustration featuring a whimsical forest scene at twilight. The main subject is a group of fantastical glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate, stylized woodland sprites. The composition should be symmetrical and circular, perfect for an apparel print. Use a vibrant, high-contrast color palette dominated by deep indigos, emerald greens, and glowing cyan accents. The art style must be a mix of Art Nouveau decorative detail and modern vector illustration, emphasizing clean lines, thick black outlines, and strong silhouettes against a dark background. The overall mood is magical, serene, and mysterious. Focus on crystalline textures and leaf veins. --ar 1:1
